title: Senior Radiologist at RML Hospital Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at RML Hospital Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
RML Hospital Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Kochi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About RML Hospital Holdings Services:
RML Hospital Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital Holdings Services!
